sections.paragraph:
μονάζω (μόνος; Cornutus 14 p. 17, 17; Anth. Pal. 5, 66, 1; Iambl., Vi. Pyth. 3, 14; 35, 253; Apollon. Dysc., Synt. 191, 2, Gramm. Gr. II/2 p. 262, 10; 376, 7; schol. on Soph., Aj. 654, Oed. R. 479; Etym. Mag. p. 627, 13; Ps 101:8) live alone, separate oneself 4:10; Hs 9, 26, 3.

Cornutus Cornutus , I a.d.—List 5

Iambl Iambl , phil., III–IV a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

Gramm. Gr. Gramm. Gr. = Grammatici Graeci—List 5

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

Mag.

Mag. = De Magistratibus Populi Romani

mag. = magic(al)

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 658
